## Why

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` тАФ new feature
- [ ] `fix` тАФ bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` тАФ no behavior change
- [ ] `chore` тАФ tooling, deps, config
- [ ] `docs` тАФ documentation only
- [ ] `test` тАФ tests only
- [ ] `perf` тАФ performance improvement

## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `bun run test` passes
- [ ] No unnecessary comments or docstrings added
